element.hint: Display progress fill within task bars
element.label: Show Progress
element.name: show_progress

element.hint: Vertical padding between task rows in pixels
element.label: Row Padding (px)
element.name: row_padding

element.hint: Color of the today marker line
element.label: Today Line Color
element.name: today_line_color

element.hint: Time granularity for the header: hour, day, week, month
element.label: Time Scale
element.name: time_scale

element.hint: Show arrow connections between dependent tasks
element.label: Show Dependencies
element.name: show_dependencies

element.hint: Draw a vertical line at today's date
element.label: Show Today Line
element.name: show_today_line

element.hint: Corner radius of task bars in pixels
element.label: Bar Corner Radius
element.name: bar_radius

element.hint: Height of the timeline header area in pixels
element.label: Header Height (px)
element.name: header_height

element.hint: Height of each task bar in pixels
element.label: Bar Height (px)
element.name: bar_height
